title: selliguea lushugangii
intro: Selliguea lushugangii, also known as the Lushugang Fern or Chinese Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including the reduction of fever, relief of respiratory issues, and improvement of digestion. In herbal preparations, Selliguea lushugangii is typically used as an infusion or decoction, often in combination with other herbs, and can be consumed as a tea or added to soups and other remedies.
